description: Create a Splunk app named 'ssh_security_monitor' (Label: 'SSH Security Monitor') at http://localhost:8000 (admin/SplunkAdmin1!). Within this app's namespace, create a saved search named 'SSH_Failed_Login_Summary' using the query 'index=security_logs fail' and a dashboard named 'ssh_overview' containing at least one panel visualizing data from the 'security_logs' index. All knowledge objects must be saved strictly within the 'ssh_security_monitor' app namespace.
